signals.headline: Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Deal as Tensions Ease Amid Ongoing Negotiations | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Deal as Tensions Ease Amid Ongoing Negotiations | YES | HIGH confidence**
